rationale: Gov't Code §2256.003 governs investment authority for state and local entities. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Each governing body of the following entities may purchase, sell, and invest its funds and funds under its control in investments authorized under this subchapter
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and the public funds investment authority statute.
